hero.tagline: Generate cases, simulate rounds, map arguments, and get judge-level feedback.

caseGen.motionPlaceholder: This house would ban private education...
caseGen.backgroundPlaceholder: Optional: provide context, constraints, actor details, or scenario. Leave blank to auto-generate. Type "n/a" to skip.

depth.competitionDesc: Full case with deep warrants, A2 blocks, MG overview

vision.desc: Map the strategic landscape of a round. Get text analysis and an interactive argument flow visualization.

roundSim.desc: Simulate a full APDA round against an AI opponent. You deliver your speeches (type or speak into mic), the AI plays the other team. After all 6 speeches, get detailed judge feedback and speaker scores.
roundSim.motionPlaceholder: Enter a motion for the round...

feedback.pastePlaceholder: Paste your full debate case here. Background, framework, arguments, everything. The AI will analyze it and give you targeted, section-by-section feedback...

practice.desc: Practice writing speeches and get AI coaching feedback. Select the speech you're practicing, type it out, and submit for review.

auth.managedDesc: Sign in to get a free trial or subscribe. No API key needed.
auth.freeDesc: Bring your own Anthropic API key. Unlimited usage, no subscription.
auth.orFreeKey: or free with your own key

about.title: About Debatable & Formats
about.apdaBody1: Debatable is structured around the American Parliamentary Debate Association format because APDA trains the skills that matter most: thinking on your feet, building persuasive frameworks under time pressure, and engaging directly with opposing arguments. Every tool in this app maps to a real moment in a round.
about.apdaBody2: The structured speech order (PMR, LOC, MG, MOC, LOR, PMR rebuttal) creates natural checkpoints for case construction, clash analysis, and strategic collapse. AI-assisted prep lets you pressure-test arguments before you walk into the round, not replace the thinking that wins debates.
about.formatsBody: Debatable supports multiple competitive debate formats used around the world. Select your format in the Case Generator to get cases structured for your circuit.
about.caseGenDesc: Generates structured PMR/LOC cases with frameworks, warrants, and impacts tailored to your motion and side.
about.roundSimDesc: Simulates full rounds speech-by-speech so you can practice responding to real opposition pressure.
about.argMapDesc: Visualizes clash points between Gov and Opp to find where your case is strongest and where it leaks.
about.judgeFeedbackDesc: Gives tab-room-style feedback on your cases so you can improve before tournament day.

formats.title: Other Debate Formats
formats.apdaDesc: American Parliamentary Debate Association — 2v2, 7 speeches, prepared + impromptu cases
formats.bpDesc: World Universities format — 4 teams of 2, Opening/Closing Gov & Opp, POIs
formats.wsdcDesc: 3v3 format used in high school worlds — 3 prepared + 1 impromptu speech per side
formats.apDesc: 3v3 format popular across Asia — similar to BP but with 2 teams, reply speeches
formats.cpDesc: Similar to BP, adapted for Canadian university circuit
formats.kpDesc: 3v3 format with cross-examination, popular in Eastern Europe and debate clubs

multilingual.whyBody: Debate is one of the most effective tools for building critical thinking, persuasion, and civic engagement. But access to quality debate prep tools has been limited to English-speaking circuits. By supporting multiple languages and formats, Debatable opens competitive debate training to debaters worldwide — whether you're prepping for a BP tournament in Seoul, a World Schools round in São Paulo, or an APDA case at UChicago.
multilingual.whyBody2: Arguing in your native language forces deeper engagement with the ideas themselves, not just the vocabulary. It develops rhetorical skills that transfer directly to professional and civic life in your own community. And for multilingual debaters, switching between languages builds cognitive flexibility that monolingual training can't match.

motions.rollDesc: Roll a random motion from the database. Filter by category.
motions.agentDesc: Generate an agent case: a character in a specific situation with a vivid, cinematic background.
motions.currentDesc: Pull this week's news and turn the most debatable story into an APDA motion.
motions.standardDesc: Generate an original debate motion with AI. Pick a category for deeper, more specific results.

argMap.hoverTrace: Hover any node to trace connections

debateBot.title: Debate the Bot
debateBot.desc: Go head-to-head with The Machine — an AI opponent with a sharp tongue and sharper arguments. Pick a motion, choose your side, and trade speeches. After 3 exchanges each, get coaching feedback.
debateBot.openingHint: Open with your framework and arguments
debateBot.respondHint: Respond to The Machine and extend your case
debateBot.inputPlaceholder: Type your speech or use the mic...
debateBot.completeDesc: All speeches delivered. Coaching feedback below.
